body_txt: Note that it doesn't have to be just stomach juice-infected / corrosive blood; parasites, and smaller zombies are also examples, just so long as they choke them out of their stomachs. This is used mostly, but not exclusively, in Video Games . A Sub-Trope of Super Spit ; compare Breath Weapon and Bad Black Barf . Involves Vomit Indiscretion Shot . See also: Elite Zombie , which has the "Vomit Zombie" subtype.
